ResponsibleTourism.sub: We believe tourism must protect the future it benefits from today.
ResponsibleTourism.impact: We measure success not only in visitors, but in impact.

WhyUs.title: Why Travel With Us
WhyUs.sub: Choosing Asili Yetu Safaris means choosing depth, responsibility, and authenticity.
WhyUs.quality_desc: We maintain strict standards with licensed professional guides and regular vehicle inspections.
WhyUs.responsible_desc: We prioritize wildlife conservation, environmental protection, and ethical tourism practices.
WhyUs.community_desc: We ensure tourism benefits reach local communities through local employment and fair partnerships.
WhyUs.authentic_desc: We avoid artificial tourism setups. What you experience is real Tanzania.
WhyUs.professional_desc: We combine African warmth with international service standards.

FunFact.label: THE WILD TRUTH
facts: The Ngorongoro Crater is the world's largest unbroken volcanic caldera and home to over 25,000 large animals.
The Great Migration is the largest movement of land mammals on Earth, with over 2 million wildebeest and zebras.
Tarangire National Park holds the highest concentration of elephants in the world during the dry season.
Mount Kilimanjaro is the highest free-standing mountain in the world and has five distinct climate zones.
Ancient Baobab trees can live for over 1,000 years and store up to 120,000 liters of water in their trunks.

About.title:
Born in the

Wild.
About.subtitle: We don't just take you to Africa. We bring Africa into your soul.
About.who_we_are: Asili Yetu Safaris is a locally owned, ethically driven, and professionally managed travel company based in Arusha, Tanzania, with a representative office in Köln, Germany.
About.origin: We were born from a deep love for Tanzania and a desire to change how the world experiences Africa. Our vision was simple but powerful: travel should not only show places, it should reveal meaning.
About.name_meaning: The name “Asili Yetu” means Our Roots in Swahili. It represents identity, belonging, and origin. It reminds us that tourism must never disconnect people from the land, but instead reconnect them to it.
About.specialization: We specialize in safaris, cultural immersion, mountain trekking, coastal experiences, and tailor-made journeys that reflect the real Tanzania.
About.storytellers: But beyond services, we are storytellers, educators, and cultural ambassadors.
About.responsibility: We believe travel is a responsibility, not just a service. Every guest we host becomes part of our extended family and part of Tanzania’s living narrative.
About.ceo_p1: I was born and raised in Tanzania. This land shaped everything about me. I grew up hearing stories from elders, walking in nature, and living close to communities that depend on the land.
About.ceo_p2: I started Asili Yetu because I felt something was missing in tourism. Many visitors saw the animals, but they didn't really connect with the people, the culture, and the real life of this country.
About.ceo_p3: Today, we have grown, but nothing inside us has changed. We are still rooted in the same values and the same love for our land. When you travel with Asili Yetu, you are experiencing Tanzania in a real, honest, and meaningful way.
About.mission_desc: To redefine African travel by creating journeys that reveal the true identity of Tanzania, connecting travelers to the land and its people with respect and integrity.
About.vision_desc: To be the leading ethical travel company in East Africa, where every expedition contributes to the preservation of our heritage and the prosperity of our communities.
About.presence_arusha: Our operational headquarters, where every safari is planned and managed by local experts.
About.presence_koln: Our European bridge, providing direct support and consultation for our international guests.
About.pillars_sub: How we ensure every journey leaves a lasting mark.
About.p_lux_sub: We believe luxury is not about excess, but about access—to nature, to peace, and to yourself.
About.p_safe_sub: Your peace of mind is our priority. We maintain the highest standards of safety in every expedition.
About.p_cons_sub: Every trip contributes to local community development and wildlife conservation efforts.

Destinations.title:
Explore

Tanzania.
Destinations.sub: At Asili Yetu Safaris, we design journeys that go beyond sightseeing. We create immersive experiences that allow travelers to feel Tanzania, not just see it.
Destinations.wildlife_safaris_desc: Tanzania is one of the most iconic wildlife destinations in the world. Home to the Great Migration, vast savannahs, and rich biodiversity, it offers unmatched safari experiences.
Destinations.cultural_immersion_desc: Culture is the heartbeat of Tanzania. We connect travelers with communities in ways that are respectful, educational, and meaningful.
Destinations.mountain_adventures_desc: For adventure seekers, Tanzania offers some of Africa’s most iconic peaks like Kilimanjaro and Meru.
Destinations.coastal_experiences_desc: Tanzania’s coastline offers a completely different world of relaxation and culture.
Destinations.customized_desc: We understand that every traveler is different. Every itinerary is carefully built around your purpose, time, and expectations.

serengeti.name: Serengeti National Park
serengeti.desc: The crown jewel of Tanzania. Home to the legendary Great Migration, where millions of wildebeest and zebra traverse the endless plains under the watchful eyes of Africa's apex predators.

ngorongoro.name: Ngorongoro Conservation Area
ngorongoro.desc: A breathtaking natural amphitheater. This collapsed volcano acts as a natural enclosure for a staggering diversity of wildlife, offering the densest concentration of Big Five animals on Earth.

tarangire.name: Tarangire National Park
tarangire.desc: The kingdom of elephants and ancient Baobab trees. Deep reddish earth and the winding Tarangire river create a spectacular dry-season sanctuary for massive herds.

kilimanjaro.name: Mount Kilimanjaro
kilimanjaro.desc: The Roof of Africa. Rising utterly alone from the surrounding plains, this dormant volcano offers one of the most awe-inspiring trekking experiences in the world.
kilimanjaro.time: January to March / August to October

manyara.name: Lake Manyara National Park
manyara.desc: Famous for its tree-climbing lions and vast flocks of flamingos, this park offers a diverse landscape from groundwater forests to the lake shores.

zanzibar.name: Zanzibar Island
zanzibar.desc: The Spice Islands. A mesmerizing blend of white sand beaches, turquoise waters, and ancient Stone Town history. The perfect sanctuary for post-safari relaxation.
zanzibar.wildlife: Red Colobus Monkeys, Sea Turtles, Dolphins

Map.discovery_sub: Navigate the Tanzanian wilderness. Click on a golden waypoint to explore the deep secrets of our private reserves.

Culture.title:
The

Maasai


Bloodline
Culture.subtitle: Step into the ancient rhythms of the savannah. We invite you to experience the deep-rooted wisdom, vibrant tapestry, and enduring strength of the Maasai people.
Culture.v_guardianship_desc: Coexisting with the wildlife as the ultimate stewards of the ecosystem for millennia.
Culture.v_ancestry_desc: Stories passed down through oral tradition, echoing from the dawn of humanity.
Culture.v_expression_desc: Every colored bead, every rhythmic jump, a celebration of the spirit of Africa.
Culture.story_1_desc: A rhythmic test of strength and grace, the celebrated jump of the Maasai youth symbolizes the spirit of the savannah.
Culture.story_2_desc: Intricate beadwork isn't just art—it's a narrative. Colors tell stories of age, status, and family history.
Culture.story_3_desc: Coexisting with lions and elephants for centuries, the Maasai embody the ultimate partnership between human and nature.

Ecosystem.sub_main: Every expedition is backed by a world-class fleet, master trackers, and precise geospatial intelligence.

Privacy.title:
Privacy

Policy
Privacy.sub: How we safeguard your digital presence while you explore the physical wild.
Privacy.intro: At Asili Yetu Safaris, we are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring your personal information is handled in a safe and responsible manner.
Privacy.section1_desc: We collect information you provide directly to us when you book a safari, subscribe to our newsletter, or contact our concierge.
Privacy.section2_desc: Your data is used solely to facilitate your expeditions, process payments, and provide high-fidelity updates on the Tanzanian wild.
Privacy.section3_desc: We implement state-of-the-art security measures to protect your digital identity from unauthorized access.
Privacy.office_label: Asili Yetu Safaris Data Protection Office, Arusha, Tanzania

Terms.title:
Terms of

Service
Terms.sub: The protocol for our shared journey into the wild.
Terms.intro: By accessing our platform and booking an expedition, you agree to the following protocols and standards.
Terms.section1_desc: All expeditions are subject to availability and confirmed only upon receipt of the deposit.
Terms.section2_desc: While we prioritize your safety above all, expeditions into the wild involve inherent risks that participants must acknowledge.
Terms.section3_desc: We expect all explorers to respect the wildlife, the environment, and the local communities during our journeys.
Terms.ack_text: By proceeding, you honor the ancient rhythms and modern standards of the Tanzanian wilderness.
